name: zoho-analytics-metadata-api
description: Reads Zoho Analytics workspace, view, and table metadata via the Zoho OAuth 2.0 refresh-token grant.

risk.read: external Zoho Analytics API read of workspace/view/table metadata
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven by internal/connectors/hooks/zoho-analytics-metadata-api's hooks_test.go (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path, gmail precedent) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
